column4: Hi small one. Good to see.
Do not go there. Bad smell.
Do not lean on that wall.
Do not touch the red thing.
Do not go past that tree.
Friend here. Good. Bad things coming.
Uh. You came. Smell wrong out there.
Mmm. You here. Good. Run things near.
Friend. Trouble coming. Glad you here.
Uh. You found me. Something bad out there.
Hello. Good you here. Danger near.
Mmm. Friend here. Eyes open now.
You came. Bad smell on wind.
Uh. Hello. Quiet but wrong quiet.
Hello friend. Stay. Things move out there.
Mmm. You here. Good. Stay close.
Hello. Something out there. Stay near.
Mmm. Friend back. Not safe now.
You here. Good. Scary things close.
Uh. Hello. Bad coming. You here.
Hello. Glad you here. Danger near.
Mmm. Friend here. Fight time soon.
You came. Smell danger. Eyes open.
Uh. Hello. Things move in dark.
Mmm. Glad you here. Bad things.
You came. Not safe alone out there.
Mmm. Friend here. Watch out now.
You made it. Bad smell everywhere.
Uh. Hello. Stay close. Things move.
Mmm. You here. Not good out there.
Hello. Trouble smell. You here. Good.
Mmm. Glad you came. Bad things near.
Hello. Good you came. Danger close.
Mmm. Smell of fear on me.
That was bad for you too?
Uh. Yes. If you with me.
Mind the sharp thing. I missed it.
Do not go too fast. Wait.
Do not lean on me yet.
Mind the low branch. My head.
Do not ask too much now.
Do not let go my hand.
Watch the root. I tripped before.
Careful. Need to stop a moment.
Mind the noise above. Still scared.
